min.below: The field {field} must be at least {min}
min.arg_not_number: The min argument must be a number

max.arg_not_number: The max argument must be a number

email.invalid: The field {field} must be a valid email address

regex.no_match: The field {field} does not match the required pattern

alpha.not_alpha: The field {field} must contain only letters

between.arg_required: The min and max arguments are required
between.invalid_range: The minimum cannot be greater than the maximum
between.not_between: The field {field} must be between {min} and {max}

integer.not_integer: The field {field} must be an integer

in.not_in_list: The field {field} must be one of the allowed values

not_in.in_list: The field {field} contains a forbidden value
